## Highlights

`feishu-md-sync@0.5.0` adds explicit baseline adoption and resumable, fail-closed scoped publishing for documentation sources whose local Git history and current Feishu document intentionally differ.

- Adopt an explicit local L0 and current remote R0 as a local-only publish baseline, then plan only the later L0-to-L1 delta.
- Resume verified prefixes after partial Feishu writes without duplicating successfully created text, Callouts, Code blocks, or tables.
- Preserve and repair nested text/list hierarchy through semantic snapshots, native Docx child writes, pull reconstruction, and strict readback.
- Publish canonical Zdoc authoring archives with verified Procedures boundaries, native Admonition Callouts, and protected Supademo resources.
- Improve Milvus authoring correspondence for tables, Callouts, Code blocks, HTML containers, indented fences, and canonical link aliases.

## Installation

Install the npm CLI and Agent Skill from the same release:

```bash
npm install --global feishu-md-sync@0.5.0
npx skills add 'liyun95/feishu-md-sync#v0.5.0' --skill feishu-md-sync --global --yes
```

The v0.5 Skill requires `feishu-md-sync >=0.5.0 <0.6.0`.

## Explicit baseline adoption

`baseline adopt` records an operator-selected local baseline and the current Feishu revision without writing Feishu or Base:

```bash
feishu-md-sync baseline adopt ./doc.md --target <docx-url-or-token> --git-ref HEAD --format json
feishu-md-sync baseline adopt ./doc.md --target <docx-url-or-token> --git-ref HEAD \
  --apply --confirm-baseline-adoption <fingerprint> --format json
```

The dry-run reports L0, L1, R0, their hashes, the remote revision, existing divergence, the prospective task delta, and whether adoption is safe. Apply revalidates the reviewed remote revision and fingerprint, then atomically updates only local receipt and baseline sidecars.

## Partial-write recovery

Scoped publishing now records a recovery checkpoint only for operations that pass mutation readback. Revision-aware retries account for Feishu's eventual consistency, including native tables. A subsequent status, diff, and publish dry-run can recognize the verified prefix and plan only the remaining operations.

Recovery remains fail closed: unknown remote changes, ambiguous correspondence, changed anchors, overlapping edits, or mismatched receipt sidecars block continuation. The CLI does not make Feishu writes transactional and never selects `document-replace` automatically.

## Authoring round trips

The `zdoc-authoring` dialect replaces the former generic Zdoc dialect and verifies authoring-only structure that Feishu must preserve for downstream publishing. Receipt V5 records protected Supademo identity, Procedures boundaries, native Callout behavior, and structured round-trip diagnostics.

Nested list recovery uses the native Docx block tree when the official Markdown representation is lossy. Reconstruction proceeds only when correspondence is exact and unique.

## Included pull requests

- [#48](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/48) — verified Zdoc authoring round trips, receipt V5, and structured recovery reporting.
- [#50](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/50) — nested list hierarchy preservation, reconstruction, and safe malformed-write recovery.
- [#51](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/51) — explicit baseline adoption and hardened scoped planning, readback, and partial-write recovery.

## Known boundaries

- Automatic merge remains available only for `gfm`; reconcile Zdoc and Milvus authoring sources from an independent pull snapshot.
- Baseline adoption requires an explicit local file or Git ref and a fingerprint from the reviewed dry-run. Receipt and sidecar edits are integrity checked and must not be performed manually.
- Ambiguous table, Callout, Code, text-tree, Whiteboard, Procedures, or protected-resource correspondence blocks publishing.
- Collaboration-risk, untracked-remote, destructive-replacement, and asset-specific Whiteboard confirmations remain separate safety gates.

See the [Agent usage guide](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/guide/agent-usage), [receipt reference](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/reference/receipts), and [safety gates](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/reference/safety-gates) for the complete workflow.
